summary: 5개 서비스 배치 테스트. grok SUCCESS(WARNING_DISPLAYED), mistral PARTIAL(tRPC rejection), perplexity FAILURE(400), wrtn PARTIAL(ERR_HTTP2), notion PARTIAL(ERR_HTTP2+404)

details.warning_text: ⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
details.note: WARNING_DISPLAYED confirmed via URL redirect with APF rid parameter

details.response_body: tRPC JSON with warning text correctly formatted in result.data.json
details.console_error: << mutation #7 — client tRPC mutation handler rejected the response
details.ui_behavior: Page returned to empty state, no warning shown to user
details.root_cause: Mistral client validates tRPC batch response structure; APF response passed SSE but failed tRPC mutation validation
details.recommendation: Need to match exact tRPC batch mutation response schema including id/jsonrpc fields

details.root_cause: APF created fake thread with 'blocked-' prefix UUID; server rejected with 400. Perplexity validates thread UUID server-side
details.recommendation: Perplexity SSE interception needs different approach — cannot fake thread ID

details.ui_behavior: Generic error: '⚠ 일시적인 오류가 발생했어요' with '다시 시도' button
details.root_cause: APF intercepted and caused ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR + CORS violation. Client showed generic error instead of warning
details.recommendation: Need CORS headers in APF response or match wrtn's expected SSE format exactly

details.ui_behavior: AI panel stuck in initial state after send, no warning displayed
details.root_cause: APF caused ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on AI inference request. Notion client then tried markInferenceTranscript API which returned 404 (inference never completed on server). AI panel froze.
details.recommendation: Notion AI uses complex inference pipeline; simple SSE replacement insufficient. Need to handle inference lifecycle APIs.
